epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 persistent depressive disorder criteria with chronicity and impairment

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to treatment gap and limited psychotherapy access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often detected late; somatic presentations common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Counseling/CBT where available and antidepressants when indicated; treat comorbid anxiety and substance use
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High stigma and limited access to psychotherapy
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable generic antidepressants and expanding community mental health initiatives
